Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Mechanics Lien And Lis Pendens, After Dismissal Of Lawsuit For Lack Of Prosecution
Off Calendar Aug-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CAROLYN APIGIAN, MICHAEL APIGIAN, CAROLYN APIGIAN AS TRUSTEE OF THE APIGIAN FAMILY's Motion For Release Of Mechanics Lien And Lis Pendens, After Dismissal Of Lawsuit For Lack Of Prosecution.

Defendants Carolyn Apigian, Michael Apigian and Apigian Family Trust's unopposed "motion for release of mechanic's lien and lis pendens, after dismissal of lawsuit for lack of prosecution" is granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
